subject: ad-toycar-agx3-performance-estimator-400mbps

config.estimator_invocation: source scripts/env.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 && dla_compiler --fanalyze-performance --march models/arch/AGX3_Performance.arch --network-file models/ir/ad-toycar/int8/ad-toycar.xml --foutput-format open_vino_hetero --fplugin HETERO:FPGA --o out.aot --dumpdir models/compiled/_ph0_scratch/ad-toycar_lliw7odi --overwrite-output-files --fdump-performance-report perf.txt --fassumed-memory-bandwidth 400

notes: FPGA AI Suite performance-estimator (HETERO:FPGA) output for ad-toycar (int8). Memory-bandwidth bottleneck reported: throughput was scaled down from the compute-only rate to match the assumed external memory bandwidth. DDR filter (weight) reads per inference: 0.530 MB vs 0.262 MB of on-disk INT8 weights -> 2.03x re-read factor. Weights are being streamed from external memory on every inference, not folded into on-chip M20K -- this arch is not a DDR-free/MIF-resident configuration regardless of model size. Activation-spill traffic (DDR feature reads + writes) per inference: 0.000 + 0.000 = 0.000 MB -- refines PLAN §5's flat 2.5 MB spill constant (below it by 2.50 MB). WARNING: on-disk IR (ad-toycar.xml, ad-toycar.bin) does not match the sha256 recorded in models/ir/ad-toycar/quant_manifest.json (mtimes show the IR was regenerated after that manifest was written -- issue #2/#3's model_prep pipeline is still an open, unmerged, not-independently-verified PR as of this issue). config.ir_sha256 above is freshly computed from the exact bytes just compiled, so this result is still self-traceable; it just may not match that manifest snapshot.
